decisions.decision: 5 plans in 3 waves — Wave 1 (data foundation) must complete before Wave 2 (3 parallel UI components)
decisions.rationale: Wave 2 plans depend on Convex tables, hooks, and utilities created in Wave 1

decisions.decision: Static agent roster in agentRoster.ts rather than live sync from Astridr
decisions.rationale: Avoids cross-repo bootstrap dependency; 10 agents hard-coded mirroring agent-types.yaml
No Astridr config changes needed — categories derived from action text

context_notes: Planning fully complete. 5 plans verified by plan-checker (0 blockers, 2 minor warnings accepted). All 13 CONTEXT.md decisions (D-01 through D-13) covered. VALIDATION.md, PATTERNS.md, UI-SPEC.md all in place. Ready for execution.
